policy: Cross-language dayKey parity fixture (M3.3, ADR-011): the SAME instants and zones must produce the SAME yyyymmdd key in the functions localDayKey (day-key.ts, Node ICU) and the app coupleDayKey (couple_day.dart, package:timezone). Consumed by functions/test/unit/day-key-parity.test.ts and app/test/features/daily_question/domain/couple_day_key_test.dart. Add ONLY tzdb-rule-stable zones with past-or-current-year instants (Istanbul fixed +03 since 2016, Riyadh fixed, New_York/London DST rules stable since 2007/1996, Kathmandu +05:45 since 1986, Chatham/Auckland stable) — never volatile zones (e.g. Asia/Gaza, Africa/Cairo, Asia/Tehran, America/Asuncion, Africa/Casablanca), whose rules can legitimately diverge between the Node ICU tzdata and the package:timezone bundled db. A mismatch here means tzdata skew or a broken mirror: both are release-blocking.
